title: lotus corniculatus subsp. brachyodon
intro: Lotus corniculatus subsp. brachyodon, also known as bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Lotus corniculatus subsp. brachyodon can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
